top_findings.summary: The skill requests `Bash(cmd:*)`, granting it unrestricted command execution capabilities on the host system. While feature engineering may involve running Python scripts or installing packages, this level of privilege (allowing any arbitrary command) is excessive for its stated purpose of creating, selecting, and transforming data features. This creates a significant security risk, as it could be used to perform actions unrelated to data processing, such as accessing sensitive files, modifying system configurations, or executing malicious code.
